hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" 2>/dev/null; c=$(git diff HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$c" | grep -q '^firmware/components/ui/' && ! echo "$c" | grep -q '^docs/watch-ui-mockup\.html'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Reminder: components/ui changed but docs/watch-ui-mockup.html was not updated \u2014 sync the mockup and commit it (see CLAUDE.md)."}'; fi
